staff.title: Staff Management
staff.subtitle: Manage your organization's team members and their access roles
staff.search: Search by name, email, role, or department…
staff.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from this organization? They will lose access.
staff.password_created_desc: Share this temporary password with the new staff member. They should change it on first login.
staff.password_helper_create: Leave empty to auto-generate. Minimum 8 characters if you set one.
staff.password_helper_edit: Leave blank to keep the current password. Enter a new value only to reset it. Minimum 8 characters.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.last_admin: Cannot proceed — this is the only admin in the organization.
errors.cannot_remove_self: You cannot remove yourself from the organization.
